name: El Paso Corporation
description: El Paso Corporation was a major provider of natural gas and related energy products, operating North America's largest natural gas pipeline system and holding significant oil and natural gas exploration and production assets. The company's operations were primarily focused on natural gas transmission and exploration and production in several key basins in the United States and Brazil. In May 2012, El Paso Corporation was acquired by Kinder Morgan, Inc., creating one of the largest midstream energy companies in North America.
